title: The Five Hindrances
teaser: The preliminary work. What blocks samādhi from arising.
gateDescription: Reliable suppression, not uprooting. Three legs: low hindrance scores sustained in the daily check-in, consistent sits logged, and journal entries that actually name the hindrances as they arise.
graduation: When the hindrances no longer derail your daily practice — when you recognize them fast and are not swept away — this layer has done its teaching. The work on them continues, but now Layer 2 opens.

title: Māra's Ten Armies
teaser: The deeper defilements. The ones the Buddha faced under the Bodhi tree.
gateDescription: Each army weakens through sustained practice over long timeframes. No 3-day challenges. The canonical word for the work is padhāna — persistent effort — and some of these armies are only fully defeated at arahantship.
graduation: The armies are not an arcade. Kāmā and Taṇhā will still move in you even when Layer 3 is open. What changes is your relationship to them: they are no longer "you". Layer 3 is about what still remains.

title: The Ten Fetters
teaser: The actual awakening markers. Named honestly, claimed by no one.
opens: after Layer 2 work is well established
gateDescription: This layer does not have a gate. The four noble persons — sotāpanna, sakadāgāmī, anāgāmī, arahant — are marked by specific fetters falling away, and no self-report system can verify that. The game maps the territory; the walking is yours and your teacher's.
graduation: Here the game says plainly what it cannot do. Close the app. Find a teacher in the living tradition. This tool was scaffolding. You are beyond scaffolding now.
